title: Senior Commercial Manager (m/w/d) – Pricing & Subscription Strategy
required_skills: 5+ years in Commercial Management, Pricing, or Product Marketing
Subscription models / recurring revenue models experience
Business case development and revenue modeling
matched_skills: GTM strategy and product launch execution
Data-driven analysis (Power BI, KPI dashboards, ROI reporting)
missing_skills: Direct pricing framework design and management
Subscription or recurring revenue model ownership
5+ years of dedicated commercial management experience
core_responsibilities: Develop and own business cases for new and existing commercial products
Define and optimize subscription and recurring revenue commercial models
Design contract structures and pricing frameworks
Drive GTM strategies for new products and markets
Collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Product, Marketing, and Finance
recommended_emphasis: Highlight business case work at HSBC (USD 8M programme, investment decision support) as direct proxy for revenue modeling
Position GTM strategy ownership across 4 product launches and EMEA/APAC markets as commercial strategy experience
Emphasize data analytics tools (Power BI PL-300, Qlik Sense) and ROI/KPI reporting as evidence of data-driven commercial decision making
Showcase competitive analysis and market segmentation as foundation for pricing and positioning decisions
Frame Master in Management & Entrepreneurship (Leuphana) as alignment with entrepreneurial, strategic thinking culture
risk_flags: Experience gap: JD requires 5+ years; candidate has approximately 3-4 years across fragmented roles (2019-2022)
No direct pricing strategy or subscription model ownership in CV — core requirement of the role
Title mismatch: 'Senior' designation implies deeper commercial autonomy than candidate's current trajectory suggests
No explicit mention of revenue or margin accountability — critical for this P&L-oriented role
